fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` is a struct that maps a palette color index to a replacement <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>. Use an array of `SKFontPaletteOverride` values to selectively replace individual color entries in a font's CPAL color palette when creating a typeface via <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments>.

The `Color` property stores the color as a `uint` in ARGB format (`0xAARRGGBB`), the same encoding used by <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 2, Color = (uint)new SKColor(0, 128, 255) }
};

var args = new SKFontArguments { PaletteIndex = 0, PaletteOverrides = overrides };
using var typeface = originalTypeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Maps a palette color index to an override color for use with variable font palette customization.

fields.value: The override color as an ARGB value (0xAARRGGBB) in <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> format.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the override color as an ARGB value (0xAARRGGBB) in <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> format.
